## Type of change

     It becomes the squash-merge commit that drives releases. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] hassfest and HACS validation pass in CI
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior changed
